The QA requirements for manufacturing and tests etc. are indicated in Section- 8 of this specification. ii) Tests at site The elevators shall be subject to various tests and inspection for safety at the site as elaborated in Section- 1 of this specification. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 4 (Piping, Valves, Thermal Insulat ion and Miscellaneous Systems/ Equipment) 4 -67 4.9 AIR CONDITIONING SYSTEM 4.9.1 General Description 4.9.1.1 Independent central chilled water type air conditioning plant shall be provided for the following areas: i) Main control room area comprising of unit control room, control equipment room, shift in-charge room, engineers room, UPS room, analyzer room etc. as applicable. ii) Service building. 4.9.1.2 2x100% capacity DX air conditioning pl ant shall be provided for ESP & VFD control room building. 4.9.1.3 Split/window air conditioners shall be provided for other areas like small offices, general areas, chemical lab etc. where stringent temperature and humidity control is not required. Suitable air conditioning system shall be provided for otherareas/buildings, which are not specifi cally mentioned above but require air conditioning. 4.9.2 Design Philosophy 4.9.2.1 Climatological data applicable for the plant site and design ambient conditions for air conditioning system shall be as per project specific data 3. Typical data is indicted as below: i) Climatological data a) Maximum mean temperature (0C) 32.5 b) Minimum temperature (0C) 17.6 c) Highest extreme 48.3 d) Lowest extreme -3.9 e) Relative Humidity • Maximum 82% • Minimum 27% f) Annual Rainfall 490.6mm g) No. of rainy days in a year 28.5 h) Mean wind speed 6.7 kmph ii) Outside design conditions Seasons Dry bulb temperature (0C) Wet bulb temperature (0C) Summer 43.3 25.8 Monsoon 39 29.9 Winter 5 4.2 3 To be furnished by purchaser. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 4 (Piping, Valves, Thermal Insulat ion and Miscellaneous Systems/ Equipment) 4 -68 4.9.2.2 All air conditioned areas which are permanently manned shall be maintained at 240C ± 10C and relative humidity of 50%± 5%. The rooms/areas which are not permanently manned like equipment control rooms shall be maintained at 220C ± 10C) and relative humidity of 50% ± 5%. 4.9.2.3 Number of fresh air changes per hour shall be minimum 1.5 or minimum 0.45 m3/min per person (16 cfm)
